generationCount.description: Number of RPH generations by the user

hasCompletedSurvey.description: Whether user has finished the survey

SurveyResponse.title: SurveyResponse
SurveyResponse.description: Individual survey response from a user

responses.description: Map of survey item IDs to ratings (1-5)

SurveyAggregate.title: SurveyAggregate
SurveyAggregate.description: Globally aggregated survey results for display

itemScores.description: Map of survey item IDs to total accumulated scores

itemCounts.description: Map of survey item IDs to number of respondents

users/{userId}.description: Stores user profiles. Created on first login.

surveys/{userId}.description: Stores user survey data. Document ID matches User UID.

stats/survey.description: Singleton document for global survey statistics.
